name: Hotel Orchard Park CO., LTD.
summary: Hotel Orchard Park CO., LTD. operates a hotel in Taiwan. The company operates the Orchard Park Hotel, an international tourist hotel with business, holiday, and transit functionalities in Taoyuan's Aerotropolis. Its hotel includes 187 guestrooms, such as deluxe king, executive rooms, Washitsu suites, executive suites, park view suites, and orchard suites. The company also provides Hee Yuet Lau Chinese restaurant, Orchard Caf√É¬©, Hanamizuki Japanese cuisine, Atrium Bar, Oasis club, banquet hall, conference room, shopping street, and business center services, as well as ball room, meeting room, pavilion, and spa services. Hotel Orchard Park CO., LTD. was founded in 2009 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
